title: Charred Bao
description: A charred, aerated kenyan dish featuring ginger paste, infuse-oil, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients. This kid-friendly dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: infuse-oil
ingredients.notes: olive oil infused with ginger and garlic

instructions: Peel the sweet potatoes and chop them into 1-inch pieces.
In a bowl, mix together the ginger paste, curry powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chickpeas, corn, and chopped green onions to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and drizzle with the infused oil.
Toss the mixture to coat evenly with the oil.
Roast the mixture in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Serve the charred bao hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
